hero.subtitle: Fill out a form. Get an instant quote. First draft in 7 days. Money-back guarantee, no questions asked.
hero.note: * No payment until you see your quote.

items.title: I am fast
items.description: First draft in 7 days. Clock starts at payment.

items.title: Get what you want
items.description: 3 rounds of revisions, 2 days max each to deliver. As many changes per round as you want.

items.title: No stress
items.description: Money-back guarantee anytime before you approve the site.

items.title: You're on the web
items.description: Site running in 2 weeks max if you don't lag on revisions.

steps.title: Fill out the form
steps.description: Tell us about your business, your style, and what you need. Takes about 10 minutes.

steps.title: Get your quote
steps.description: Instant quote based on your answers. No surprises, no hidden fees.

steps.title: First draft
steps.description: Your site is built and ready for review within 7 days of payment.

steps.title: Revisions
steps.description: 3 rounds of revisions, 2 days max each to deliver. As many changes per round as you want.

steps.title: Launch
steps.description: We publish your site. You're live. The whole thing takes 2 weeks max.

socialBanner.title: Social economy
socialBanner.description: Are you a cooperative, non-profit, or community organization? I build the same quality sites for free — one project at a time.

finalCta.title: Ready?
